entry.title: New: BILL012(26) (Honolulu) — MAYOR
entry.content:
RELATING TO SEWERS, DRAINAGE, AND CESSPOOLS.

Requires a department to be designated by the Mayor to make certain information relating to the City's wastewater system and separate storm sewer system publicly accessible. Establishes reporting requirements.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/22/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site
